title: botrychium dissectum
intro: Botrychium dissectum, also known as the cut-leaved grape fern, is a type of rare and endangered plant species belonging to the Ophioglossaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Botrychium dissectum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and aid in the healing of wounds. Botrychium dissectum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, and is often used in folk medicine to treat conditions such as skin irritations, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
